security.comment: Local-first launcher: CSP disabled so the window can embed the localhost STT UI (:8000) in an iframe and talk to the TTS sidecar (:8011). Nothing is loaded from the public internet.

bundle.comment: 'all' builds only the bundle types valid for the HOST OS: macOS -> app + dmg; Windows -> nsis (.exe) + msi; Linux -> appimage + deb + rpm. Tauri cross-compiles nothing, so each installer is produced on its own OS.
